note: Scenario contract for smackerel's consumption of the knb spec-014 scope-03 shared-observability instrumentation contract (reconciliation, not greenfield). SCN-101-A01 (fail-loud 3-var read) + SCN-101-A03 (com.bubbles.* discovery labels) are fully unit/contract-proven offline under SCOPE-01. SCN-101-A02 has two halves: the in-repo /metrics route + handler existence is proven under SCOPE-01 (reuses internal/api/router.go + internal/metrics), while the LIVE 200 scraped by the shared Prometheus is apply-gated under SCOPE-02 (DEFERRED-to-flip; no live <deploy-host> mutation this session). Every scenario is linked 1:1 to its owning scope and a report.md evidence anchor.

scenarios.title: smackerel reads the 3 instrumentation env vars fail-loud
scenarios.given: smackerel core boots and OTEL_ENABLED=true (the shared posture the operator + knb adapter turn on together)
scenarios.when: the 3 canonical env vars OTLP_TRACES_ENDPOINT / OTLP_LOGS_ENDPOINT / METRICS_SCRAPE_LABEL_PRODUCT are read from the generated config bundle
scenarios.then: the service-tier observability.Config validates them fail-loud — any missing OR empty/whitespace value aborts startup with a named error (no default, no fallback), while all-non-empty succeeds; when OTEL_ENABLED=false the contract is inert and startup is unaffected

scenarios.title: smackerel exposes /metrics with Prometheus exposition (route reused; live 200 apply-gated)
scenarios.then: the route is wired in-repo (internal/api/router.go r.Handle("/metrics", metrics.Handler()) → promhttp) and returns 200 text/plain with process + go runtime metrics; the LIVE 200 scraped by the shared Prometheus on <deploy-host> is DEFERRED-to-flip under SCOPE-02 (apply-gated, no live mutation)

scenarios.title: smackerel containers carry com.bubbles.product + com.bubbles.service
scenarios.given: the smackerel dev compose (docker-compose.yml) and deploy compose (deploy/compose.deploy.yml)
scenarios.when: the shared-observability label contract is asserted against each file
scenarios.then: every service carrying a com.smackerel.component label also carries a non-empty com.bubbles.product (SST-sourced ${METRICS_SCRAPE_LABEL_PRODUCT}) and com.bubbles.service label, and an adversarial mutation removing either label is rejected

scenarios.title: Live /metrics 200 scraped by the shared Prometheus (deferred-to-flip)
scenarios.given: smackerel is flipped to sharedServices.observability: shared and the operator has run apply-shared-obs on <deploy-host>
scenarios.when: the shared Prometheus docker_sd discovers smackerel-core by com.bubbles.product and scrapes /metrics
scenarios.then: GET /metrics returns 200, the product=smackerel scrape label is visible, and OTLP spans land in the shared Tempo — DEFERRED-to-flip (no live host mutation this session; the in-repo route + discovery labels that enable this are proven by health_test.go + the labels contract test)
